sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114344" key="xolhmete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χολημ-ετέω</orth>, <sense id="n114344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vomit bile,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:31:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.31.4</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χολεμετέω.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
